name: What makes a website eligible to appear in AI answers?

mainEntity.name: What makes a website eligible to appear in AI answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: You need content that is easy for AI systems to parse and trust. That usually means clear headings, direct answers, factual detail, visible structured data, and a site that is technically accessible to crawlers.
acceptedAnswer.description: Clear structure, crawlability, schema, and trustworthy content are the main requirements.

description: Clear structure, crawlability, schema, and trustworthy content are the main requirements.
